footer.tagline: Elevated Indian comfortwear crafted from natural bio-washed fabrics. Heritage in every thread.

shop.womenDescription: Relaxed lounge sets and premium Indo-Western comfortwear for the modern Indian woman.
shop.kidsDescription: Premium co-ords, nightwear, and occasion sets for boys and girls.
shop.womenLoungeSetsDescription: Cloud-soft co-ord sets in modal, French terry, and jersey knit. Designed for the unhurried day.
shop.womenIndoWesternDescription: Kurta sets, palazzo co-ords, and dhoti silhouettes in handloom and Chanderi cotton.
shop.boysPremiumDescription: Structured track sets, canvas co-ords, and utility shorts in durable bio-washed fabrics.
shop.girlsPremiumDescription: Gathered kurta sets, linen co-ords, and printed lounge sets in breathable natural fabrics.
shop.kidsNightwearDescription: Supima cotton and jersey knit sleep sets. Gentle on skin, soft to touch, all-season comfort.
shop.unisexDescription: Heavyweight cargo pants and oversized tees in 240–340 GSM bio-washed cotton. Built for movement, worn for life.
shop.cargoPantsDescription: Six-pocket utility cuts in 300–340 GSM bio-washed cotton. Built for movement, styled for the city.
shop.overTeeShirtsDescription: Boxy drop-shoulder silhouettes in 240–260 GSM combed cotton. The everyday statement piece.
